title: NOAA Hurricanes
description: A NOAA source card about hurricane science, forecasting, hazards, and preparedness.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA hurricane resources explain tropical cyclones, storm surge, wind, rainfall, forecasting, observations, and preparedness.
Use this source for students reading hazard maps, interpreting forecasts, and explaining how atmosphere and ocean conditions shape storms.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
